_comment: Committed host-policy VERDICT object (normalized shape the merge-authority adapter consumes). This is the projection of a host-policy decision: top-level mode + confirmation_token + outcome marker. The host-policy module (init-ai-repo/modules/host-policy-automation.md) owns the token regex, admin matrix, and audit format; this fixture only carries the already-decided verdict so the adapter's shape contract is anchored to a committed artifact, not only inline test mocks.
